posts.content: ComfyUI-See-through: A ComfyUI plugin that wraps [See-through](https://github.com/shitagaki-lab/see-through) — an AI system that decomposes a single anime illustration into manipulatable 2.5D layer-decomposed models with depth ordering, ready for Live2D workflows.

ai.why_important: Bridges AI image generation with character animation workflows by automatically preparing layered assets for Live2D rigging.
ai.learnings: AI can decompose flat anime art into depth-ordered layers suitable for 2.5D character animation systems like Live2D.

posts.content: ComfyUI-MultiGPU: This custom_node for ComfyUI adds one-click "Virtual VRAM" for any UNet and CLIP loader as well MultiGPU integration in WanVideoWrapper, managing the offload/Block Swap of layers to DRAM *or* VRAM to maximize the latent space of your card. Also includes nodes for directly loading entire components (UNet, CLIP, VAE) onto the device you choose

ai.title: ComfyUI-MultiGPU: one-click Virtual VRAM and multi-GPU layer offloading for ComfyUI
ai.summary: Custom node adding Virtual VRAM and multi-GPU support to ComfyUI, managing layer offload to DRAM or VRAM to maximize latent space. Includes nodes for loading UNet, CLIP, VAE onto specific devices.
ai.why_important: Enables complex ComfyUI workflows to run on limited VRAM by intelligently managing memory across multiple GPUs and system RAM.
ai.learnings: ComfyUI workflows can dynamically offload model layers across multiple GPUs and system RAM to overcome VRAM limitations.

Features AI scriptwriting, storyboarding, character and video generation. A cross-platform desktop app for efficient content creation.

posts.content:
AI and Product Design

At Whatnot, a few designers started experimenting with tools like Cursor, Claude, and Figma. We asked them to share their workflows with the rest of the product design team—and within weeks, it completely changed how we work.

In less than three weeks, we've turned every designer into a world class prototyper. They're building advanced, high-quality prototypes that previously required specialized tools like ProtoPie or Framer—or even production-level code. Now, they can create them in just a few hours instead of weeks. 

This has been one of the most significant and disruptive workflow shifts I’ve seen in over 20 years in design. 

It’s an exciting time to be building products.

ai.title: AI and Product Design
ai.summary: Whatnot 的设计团队在三周内通过 Cursor、Claude 和 Figma 的组合，让每位设计师都能创建高质量原型。以前需要专业工具或生产级代码、耗时数周的原型，现在只需几小时。
ai.why_important: 显著缩短了从设计到可交互原型的时间，将专业级原型制作能力普及到整个设计团队。
ai.learnings: 组合使用 AI 编程工具（Cursor/Claude）与设计工具（Figma），可以让非工程背景的设计师快速构建复杂交互原型。

author.name: Lisa Dion
author.headline: I turn brand strategy into campaign-ready design that works across every channel. AI Creative Partner for Weavy, ImagineArt, Vilva, Lumoo +

posts.content:
The GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2.0 workflow that's rewriting how AI video gets made.

Two tools. One workflow. Full cinematic production.

The GPT Image 2 process:

You don't prompt images one at a time. You prompt a storyboard grid. A single request generates a 4 or 6-panel layout with camera angles, character blocking, and scene composition all locked in one pass.

Then you generate a character(s) reference sheet showing your subject from multiple angles. This is what keeps your characters (and scenes) consistent when they show up across shots.

The Seedance 2.0 process:

Upload your storyboard grid and character sheet as a reference images. Seedance 2.0 reads the visual blueprint and animates structured cinematic sequences up to 15 seconds per clip. Slow pushes. Tracking shots. Motivated camera movement.

Prompt: @ref# as storyboard guide following panels 1 through 4 in sequence. Slow cinematic aerial push....

Vilva.ai is a node-based visual canvas that connects every model in this stack into a single workspace:

- GPT Image 2 for storyboarding and reference sheets
- Seedance 2.0 for cinematic animation
- ElevenLabs for voice and sound design
- GPT-5 and Claude for creative direction and scripting
- Timeline for compositing and editing.

No platform switching. 

Try Vilva: https://vilva.ai/

#Vilva #Seedance #GPTImage2 #AIVideo #AIProduction

ai.title: The GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2.0 workflow that's rewriting how AI video gets made
ai.workflow_stage: concept / ideation | asset creation | animation / motion
ai.summary: 用 GPT Image 2 生成 4-6 格故事板网格，包含镜头角度、角色位置和场景构图，同时生成多角度角色参考表。然后将故事板上传到 Seedance 2.0 进行视频生成，保持角色和场景的一致性。
ai.why_important: 通过结构化的故事板和参考表工作流，解决了 AI 视频生成中角色和场景一致性的核心问题。
ai.learnings: 使用网格布局的故事板和多角度角色参考表是保持 AI 视频生成一致性的关键技术。

author.name: Denis Unagst
author.headline: AI-Generated Video Ads for E-commerce & Agencies | Faster. Cheaper. Scalable.

posts.content:
Breakdown of Evgeny Bulanov’s AI brand film for BOTENZ. 
Zero real product. 100% AI. Here's the pipeline that made it work.🎬

A brand film for BOTENZ, made entirely with AI, when the actual product didn't exist yet. Projects like this are exactly why any of this matters.

What stuck with me from the pipeline:
Kling 2.5 + manual label compositing in After Effects - AI still struggles with fine details. Skip this step and any product video looks like a beautiful but unfinished demo reel.
Ditching sterile gloss in favor of ARRI Alexa aesthetics - soft light, organic texture. That's exactly what I try to build into my prompts: not "pretty," but "real."
Suno with stem separation + ElevenLabs v3 - audio finally stops being the weakest link in AI video.
Topaz upscale with cinematic grain -  the finishing touch that turns "neural" into "cinematic."

But the one thing I'm taking away: the time-remap trick - cut all clips at normal speed first, then adjust the tempo of the whole scene at once. AI generation seams just disappear. Elegant and obvious in hindsight.

AI video only becomes a professional tool when it's backed by an understanding of classical production - lighting, editing, sound, the physics of motion. Without that foundation, even the best prompt just produces beautiful noise.

Question for you: what matters more in a commercial AI video right now - perfect photorealism, or a lived-in atmosphere with intentional imperfection?
👇 Curious what you think
#AIVideo #GenerativeAI #VideoProduction #Kling #AICommercial

ai.title: Breakdown of Evgeny Bulanov's AI brand film for BOTENZ
ai.workflow_stage: asset creation | layout / composition | rendering / export
ai.summary: 使用 Kling 2.5 生成视频，然后在 After Effects 中进行手动标签合成。采用 ARRI Alexa 美学（柔光、有机纹理）替代立体光泽效果。强调了 AI 在细节处理上的局限性，必须通过后期合成来完善产品视频。
ai.why_important: 明确指出 AI 视频生成的当前限制：细节处理仍需人工合成，跳过这一步会导致作品看起来像未完成的演示片段。
ai.learnings: AI 生成的产品视频必须经过 After Effects 等工具的手动合成和标签调整才能达到商业标准；美学选择（如 ARRI Alexa 风格）对最终效果至关重要。

author.name: Rory Flynn
author.headline: AI Workflows for Marketers || Ai Workshops for Creative + Marketing Teams || Ai Keynote Speaker || Helping You Find Practical Usage of Ai in Your Business

posts.content:
GPT2 + Seedance 2.0 → Capoeira Sequence.

Testing for more complex choreography.

FULL WORKFLOW: https://lnkd.in/ezkF7vDV

TOOLS:
+ Weavy: Workflow Build
+ GPT2: Diagrams
+ Midjourney: Aesthetic reference
+ Seedance 2.0: Animation

PROCESS:
01. Gen sequence diagram w. GPT2
02. Gen camera motion diagram w. GPT2
03. Connect those + prompt to SD2 omni-ref
04. Generate 

Building on this post: https://lnkd.in/e2T79gf8

CONTEXT:
+ I wanted to test this process further
+ Instead of 1 diagram we tried 2
+ (1) diagram outlining the fight sequence 
+ (1) diagram outlining the camera motion
+ A Midjourney image to build the environment
+ To see how much SD2 actually listens 

FLAWS:
+ SD2 did not follow step-by-step
+ It blended some of the chars. moves together
+ But nailed around 70% of the flow
+ I ran this generation (4) times 
+ Each time it would follow 1 of the 2 diagrams more
+ The trick here might be to combine both diagrams
+ Into one image and feed that in as a reference
+ Probably hits info overload at certain point 

QUICK THOUGHTS: 
+ Not 100% effective in this run 
+ The visual is still cool + useful 
+ The physics + camera motion is great
+ Probably need to test diff prompting styles
+ And test different diagram builds
+ One thing is clear…SD2 is reading these
+ It is understanding them…and producing
+ Even if it’s not 100% accurate (yet)

As always…not perfect.
Still think this opens up a lot of ideas.
Keep doing weird stuff.

Have fun.

#chatgpt #ai #innovation #weavy #kling #seedance

ai.title: GPT2 + Seedance 2.0 → Capoeira Sequence
ai.summary: 使用 GPT2 生成两个图表：战斗序列图和摄像机运动图。将这两个图表与 Midjourney 的美学参考连接到 Seedance 2.0 的 omni-ref 进行动画生成。测试了更复杂的编舞序列制作流程。
ai.why_important: 展示了如何用多层次的图表（动作序列 + 摄像机运动）作为 AI 视频生成的精确控制手段，提高复杂动作场景的生成质量。
ai.learnings: 将复杂动作分解为序列图和摄像机运动图两个独立的控制层，可以更精确地指导 AI 视频生成器产出符合预期的动作场景。

author.name: Max Vaselashko
author.headline: 3D Product Animation & AI Video for B2B SaaS & Brands

posts.content:
🚀 Hybrid Production: 3D + AI for SaaS Explainer Videos
I’m excited to share my latest project—a promo video for an invoice-management SaaS. In this work, I’ve combined a classic 3D pipeline with the power of AI tools to achieve high-quality results while significantly accelerating the production process.
The Workflow:
Cinema 4D: Used for blocking and precise camera work. This provided total control over composition and scene geometry.
AI Tools: I leveraged AI to handle the shading, lighting, and final visual polish.
The result speaks for itself. This hybrid approach isn't just about efficiency; it's about pushing the boundaries of what's possible at the intersection of technology and creativity. I’ll definitely be exploring this direction further.
I'd love to hear your thoughts on this workflow in the comments! 👇

#AI #AIvideo #3D #Marketing #SaaS #MotionDesign #Cinema4D #ProductVideo #ExplainerVideo #TechTrends

ai.title: Hybrid Production: 3D + AI for SaaS Explainer Videos
ai.summary: 使用 Cinema 4D 进行场景布局和精确的摄像机工作，然后利用 AI 工具处理着色、照明和最终视觉效果。这种混合方法在保持对构图和场景几何的完全控制的同时，显著加快了生产流程。
ai.why_important: 展示了传统 3D 工具与 AI 的最佳结合点：用 3D 软件控制精确度，用 AI 加速渲染和视觉效果。
ai.learnings: 将 3D 软件用于需要精确控制的环节（构图、摄像机），将 AI 用于耗时的渲染环节（着色、照明），可以实现效率与质量的平衡。

posts.content:
GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2 = Incredible video ads

It makes your video workflows faster, cheaper, and more scalable.

That’s one of the best AI tricks I’ve discovered recently.

And I’m sharing it with you:

1) Brief + packshot.
You give the workflow your creative brief and your product image.

2) GPT Image 2 builds your storyboard.
It creates it frame by frame and shows it in one image. You review every shot before a single video credit gets spent (a bit like old nanobanana grid).

3) Seedance 2 takes the storyboard and generates the video. The storyboard is the prompt. Each frame becomes a video clip. The model knows exactly what you want because you designed it with unmatched precision.

The result: a video ad where every frame was intentional.
No guessing. No credit waste. No "let's try again."

Comment "Storyboard" and I'll send you the workflow.

ai.title: GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2 = Incredible video ads
ai.summary: 使用 GPT Image 2 生成逐帧故事板，然后用 Seedance 2.0 将故事板转换为视频。故事板作为提示词，每一帧成为视频片段。
ai.why_important: 通过故事板预审流程，在消耗视频生成额度之前就能审查每个镜头，提高了视频制作效率和成本控制。
ai.learnings: 先用 AI 生成故事板网格布局，审核通过后再进行视频生成，避免浪费生成额度。

author.name: Carlo Costantini
author.headline: Tech Leader - Design, Build, Operate Secure Distributed Systems - AI Driven Agentic Development

posts.content: A 2D image generated from an interaction with AI image generator was converted into a 3D Mesh in Blender on commodity hardware running Linux. This isn't SORA pixel magic, this is 3D modeling, something NanoBanana, ChatGPT or Claude can't do today. Claude co-ordinated with ComfyUI, open source models and Blender. Total time to generate this very simplistic and modest example took less than 8 hours spread out over a couple days as this is a hobby not a full time job. The harder part is getting the mesh broken down into components that allow posing the models.

ai.title: A 2D image generated from an interaction with AI image generator was converted into a 3D Mesh in Blender
ai.summary: 使用 Claude 协调 ComfyUI、开源模型和 Blender，在普通硬件上将 AI 生成的 2D 图像转换为 3D 网格。整个过程耗时不到 8 小时（分散在几天内），最困难的部分是将网格分解为可摆姿势的组件。
ai.why_important: 展示了在普通硬件上通过 AI 编排实现 2D 到 3D 转换的完整管道，这是传统 3D 建模工具难以实现的自动化流程。
ai.learnings: Claude 可以作为协调器，串联 ComfyUI 和 Blender 实现 2D 到 3D 的转换；网格组件化是实现可操作 3D 模型的关键步骤。

author.name: Shikha Arora
author.headline: Founder & CEO @ FluidFit.ai | Replacing Manual AI Media Production with Repeatable Workflows

posts.content:
Not going to pretend this replaces your motion graphics team.

But it gives everyone else on the team the ability to add motion - without waiting for one.

Here's how easy FluidFitAI makes it:

→ Import a PSD

→ Extract the layers automatically

→ Plug into the AI Motion Graphics node

→ Choose your preferred AI Model 

→ Tweak the duration and options

→ Export!

A few minutes is all it takes. No After Effects or keyframe wrangling.



For creative agencies, this changes something specific - motion no longer has to be a specialist task that creates a bottleneck. Any designer with a PSD can now produce animated content independently.

More output with the same team.

Happy to show you how FluidFit fits into your existing workflow. DM or drop a comment.

ai.title: FluidFitAI workflow: PSD layer extraction to AI motion graphics without After Effects or keyframing
ai.summary: Author outlines a specific workflow: import PSD, auto-extract layers, plug into AI Motion Graphics node, select AI model, adjust duration/options, and export. The process takes minutes and eliminates the need for After Effects or manual keyframing.
ai.why_important: Removes motion design bottlenecks in creative agencies by enabling any designer with a PSD to add motion without specialist skills or waiting for motion graphics teams.
ai.learnings: FluidFitAI's AI Motion Graphics node can take layered PSD files and convert them to motion graphics through model selection and parameter tweaking, democratizing motion design within teams.
